Our Story

Chhattisgarh's Most
Trusted Clinic

"True beauty lives at the intersection of art and medicine."

Dr. Neeraj's Cosmetic Krafts is the leading name in plastic surgery and aesthetic medicine in Chhattisgarh. Our clinic in Civil Lines, Raipur combines world-class equipment, artistic expertise, and deeply personalised care — delivering natural, radiant results for every patient.

What We Offer

Our Signature Treatments

A complete menu of aesthetic and surgical solutions — from non-invasive skin care to life-changing procedures.

Acne Scar Treatments

Advanced multi-modality approach — peels, lasers, and micro needling to erase scars and reveal clear, even skin.

Skin Correction
Advanced Chemical Peel

Targeted peels for glow, acne, pigmentation, melasma, de-tanning, and dark patches — improve texture, tone, and appearance.

Skin Resurfacing
Hair Transplant (FUE/FUT)

High-density hair restoration using the latest FUE and FUT techniques. Natural-looking, permanent results for men and women.

Surgical
Rhinoplasty

Expert nose reshaping that harmonises facial features. Surgical precision for natural, balanced beauty — the right nose lifts everything.

Plastic Surgery
Laser Treatment

Targeted scar reduction and skin rejuvenation using precision laser technology. Clinically proven and safe for Indian skin tones.

Laser
Micro Needling

Collagen-boosting micro needling for open pores, acne scars, and skin rejuvenation. Minimal downtime, maximum radiance.

Collagen Boosting

We also offer: HydraFacial  ·  Botox  ·  Dermal Fillers  ·  HIFU Non-Surgical Facelift  ·  Laser Hair Removal (Soprano Titanium)  ·  Cosmelan Peel  ·  Hollywood Facial  ·  Thread Lift  ·  Breast Augmentation  ·  Gynecomastia  ·  Vitiligo Surgery  ·  Carbon Facial  ·  Hand & Feet Rejuvenation

View All Prices
Our Technology

Laser Hair Removal
Reinvented

Cosmetic Krafts is one of very few clinics in Chhattisgarh equipped with the Soprano Titanium by Alma Lasers — the world's most advanced laser hair removal platform. Our certificate of authenticity guarantees you get the real, approved equipment — never a counterfeit machine.

Virtually Pain-Free — SHR gradual heating, not sudden pulses
All Skin Types — Safe on Indian skin, zero risk of burns
Permanent Results — Clinically proven long-lasting hair reduction
ICE Plus™ — Continuous cooling for maximum comfort
Transparent Pricing
